items.title: Frontend Developer Intern
items.description: Build responsive web interfaces using React and TailwindCSS. Collaborate with designers and backend engineers to ship features.

items.title: Backend Developer
items.description: Design and build REST APIs in Python and FastAPI. Containerize services with Docker and manage Postgres schemas.

items.title: Full Stack Engineer
items.description: Own features end-to-end across React frontends and Node.js services. Deploy to AWS.

items.title: Data Scientist
items.description: Build analytics pipelines and ML baselines. Communicate insights to product stakeholders.

items.title: Machine Learning Engineer
items.description: Train and deploy ML models at scale. Build training pipelines and feature stores.

items.title: Mobile Developer (Android)
items.description: Build native Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

items.title: Mobile Developer (iOS)
items.description: Build native iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI.

items.title: DevOps Engineer
items.description: Operate Kubernetes clusters, write Terraform modules, and own CI/CD pipelines.

items.title: Cloud Engineer (AWS)
items.description: Design and operate AWS infrastructure. Automate with Terraform and Python.

items.title: Site Reliability Engineer
items.description: Improve reliability of production systems. Build observability with Prometheus and Grafana.

items.title: Data Engineer
items.description: Build ETL pipelines with Airflow and Spark. Model warehouses for analytics.

items.title: QA Automation Engineer
items.description: Write end-to-end and integration tests. Maintain CI pipelines.

items.title: Security Engineer
items.description: Threat modeling, code review, and incident response for web platforms.

items.title: UI/UX Designer
items.description: Design accessible, on-brand experiences. Run user research and usability tests.

items.title: Product Manager
items.description: Define product strategy, write specs, and partner with engineering.

items.title: Technical Writer
items.description: Write developer-facing docs and tutorials for SDKs and APIs.

items.title: AI Research Intern
items.description: Run experiments on transformer architectures and publish internal notes.

items.title: NLP Engineer
items.description: Ship NLP features such as classification, retrieval, and summarization.

items.title: Computer Vision Engineer
items.description: Build vision models and deploy them to edge devices.

items.title: Junior Web Developer
items.description: Build marketing pages and small web apps. Good entry-level role.

items.title: WordPress Developer
items.description: Build and maintain WordPress sites and custom themes.

items.title: Game Developer (Unity)
items.description: Build gameplay systems and tooling in Unity.

items.title: Embedded Software Engineer
items.description: Write firmware for ARM microcontrollers and Linux-based devices.

items.title: Salesforce Developer
items.description: Build custom Salesforce apps with Apex and Lightning Web Components.

items.title: Solidity Developer
items.description: Write and audit smart contracts on EVM chains.

items.title: Solutions Architect
items.description: Architect cloud-native systems for enterprise customers.

items.title: Customer Success Engineer
items.description: Help customers integrate the product and debug technical issues.

items.title: Growth Marketing Analyst
items.description: Run growth experiments and analyze funnels.

items.title: Junior Data Analyst
items.description: Build dashboards and ad-hoc analyses for product and ops teams.

items.title: Platform Engineer
items.description: Build internal developer platform tooling on Kubernetes.

items.title: iOS/Android Cross-Platform Developer
items.description: Ship cross-platform apps with React Native.

items.title: Database Administrator
items.description: Operate production databases and tune queries.

items.title: Docker Fundamentals
items.description: Learn containers, images, networking, and Docker Compose.

items.title: Kubernetes for Developers
items.description: Deploy and operate apps on Kubernetes. Pods, Services, Deployments, Ingress.

items.description: Build production-grade React apps using hooks, context, and Suspense.

items.title: TypeScript Complete Guide
items.description: Learn TypeScript from basics to generics and advanced types.

items.title: FastAPI in Production
items.description: Build scalable REST APIs in FastAPI with auth, validation, and testing.

items.description: Schema design, indexes, transactions, and query tuning in Postgres.

items.description: EC2, S3, IAM, RDS, and basic Terraform workflows.

items.title: Terraform Up & Running
items.description: Write reusable Terraform modules for production infrastructure.

items.description: Numpy, Pandas, and Jupyter for data analysis.

items.title: Machine Learning with scikit-learn
items.description: Train classical ML baselines and evaluate them properly.

items.description: Build and train neural networks in PyTorch.

items.title: NLP with Transformers
items.description: Use Hugging Face transformers for classification and retrieval.

items.description: Patterns for designing scalable systems in interviews.

items.title: Clean Code Principles

items.title: REST API Design
items.description: Design clean, versioned, well-documented REST APIs.

items.description: Build responsive, accessible UIs with Tailwind utilities.

items.title: Figma for Developers
items.description: Read design specs and collaborate effectively with designers.

items.description: Navigate, edit, and script in the Linux shell.

items.description: Build and ship cross-platform mobile apps.
